title: Boat Rental Costs in Lake Victoria Ke: A 2026 Guide
html:
Renting a boat on Lake Victoria Ke offers an affordable way to explore the world's largest tropical lake, with prices from EUR 80 for a shared tour from Kisumu pier. BoatHire24 connects you with verified skippers and vessels across the Kenyan shoreline.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Lake Victoria Ke?

Basic costs range from EUR 80 for a shared tour to EUR 1,200 for a full-day crewed yacht charter in high season. Prices depend on boat type, duration, and whether fuel is included. Here is a typical price breakdown:

  • Shared tour (half-day, 8, 12 guests): EUR 80 per person
  • Small motorboat half-day (up to 6 guests, no skipper): EUR 150, 200
  • Catamaran full-day (up to 10 guests, with skipper): EUR 600, 900
  • Crewed yacht full-day (up to 8 guests, all inclusive): EUR 900, 1,200

To compare verified listings and secure a booking, you can rent a boat through BoatHire24's simple reservation system.

Where to set off in Lake Victoria Ke

The best departure points include Kisumu, Homa Bay, Mbita, Kendu Bay, and the islands of Rusinga and Mfangano. Kisumu is the main hub with the largest marina, Kisumu Yacht Club, offering mooring and charter services. Mbita provides direct access to Rusinga Channel, ideal for fishing trips. Homa Bay serves the southern waters. From these points, you can reach the scenic Mfangano Island, about 30 nautical miles from Mbita, known for its ancient rock art and quiet coves.

Which boat to rent

  1. Mefasa 90 motor yacht, a 40-foot luxury boat perfect for day cruises with up to 12 guests, from EUR 800 half-day. See the Mefasa 90 for hire on BoatHire24 for details and availability.
  2. Azimut 68 flybridge, an opulent choice for corporate events and sunset trips, carrying up to 10 guests, from EUR 1,100 full-day.
  3. Lagoon 450 catamaran, stable and spacious for family holidays, up to 10 guests, from EUR 700 full-day.
  4. Local dhow boat, a traditional sailing experience, perfect for small groups of 4, 6, from EUR 120 half-day.
  5. Fishing boat (16ft with outboard), simple and effective for angling trips, up to 4 guests, from EUR 150 half-day.

When to go and do you need a licence?

Peak season runs from December to March and July to September when the weather is dry and the wind is from the northeast, known locally as the Kaskazi. For self-drive motorboats under 15 horsepower, Kenya does not require a licence, but for larger vessels you need an International Certificate of Competence (ICC). Operators on BoatHire24 will confirm exact requirements when you book.

Try an early-morning departure from Kisumu Yacht Club to catch the calm waters before the afternoon breeze picks up, and you may see the elusive Sitatunga antelope along the lake's papyrus edges.

At a glance

  • Price band: EUR 80, 1,200
  • Peak months: Dec, Mar, Jul, Sep
  • Trip length: 2 hours to full day
  • Max capacity: 12 guests on most yachts
  • Currency: EUR (prices quoted in euros)
  • Booking: Online via BoatHire24, secure payment

Questions about boat rental in Lake Victoria Ke

Can I rent a boat without a skipper?

Yes, small motorboats under 15 HP can be rented without a skipper, but you must hold a valid ICC for larger vessels.

Is it safe to sail on Lake Victoria Ke?

Lake Victoria can experience sudden storms, so always check weather forecasts and use a VHF radio; charter companies on BoatHire24 prioritise safety.

What is the best island to visit from Kisumu?

Mfangano Island, with its famous rock paintings and secluded beaches, is a favourite destination about two hours from Kisumu.

How do I book online?

You can use the boat search on BoatHire24 to filter by date, boat type, and capacity, then confirm your booking instantly.

Whether you seek a fishing adventure or a luxury cruise, Lake Victoria Ke offers diverse boating experiences at reasonable prices. Boat owners can list their vessels to earn income by becoming a host on BoatHire24. check availability for your 2026 trip now.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Lake Victoria Ke and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
